TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_An-man, title = An-man, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/An-man} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == An-man "A-la-pow a kamu, ōĻŔÖōßŔÜmasaluma, 'AmmńĀn,( ēamňźaňźn)" nu Si-ya a kanatal Ya-tan angangan atu satabakiay a tukay, nuyniay kanatal a kezay, cen-ce atu pulung nu lalangawan, katukuh 2021 a mihcaan, 4,061,150, ku tademaw nu An-man, u satabakiay a tukay nu Li-ban a kakitizaan, A-la-pow i kitakit u sakalima nu tabakiay a tukuy atu sawalian a kakitizaan nu sakasiwa tabakiay a kakitizaan. tukuy tiin i nuwamisan nuyni a kanatal, satipan nu A-ci-lun a buyubuyu'an. kitizaan a ngangan nu An-man makayniay nicalapan a buyu' nu heni "Jabal" anucaay diheb "Wadi", saayaway a katahkalan taneng pasuzikuz katukuh kung-yen8 a se-ci, tiza nipanganganan a An-ca-le nazipaan nu baluhay ba'tuay a ziday, itiza tahkal ku kitakitay nu kasumamaday nitu'tu'an ci An-ca-le tu masatademaway. i nu mukin a ziday, uyni a tukay pangangan han tu Rabbath Ammon, kilul i likisian nakatuud ku masasumaay mikuwan, pasu angangan a tukay nu Ya-men hungti a kanatal. kung-yen 3 se-ci,Tow-le-mi hungti a zidayay a Ay-ci atu ba-law Tow-le-mi al-se muliyaw patizeng tuyni a tukuay, pasumad tu ngangan "bey-la-tye-bey" han, malakitizaan nu lalangawan nu Si-la. i pikuwanan nu Low-ma, bey-la-tye-bey na u Te-ka-pow-li-say nu sabaw cacay a tukay nu Si-la-low-ma, sakuwan nu Pey-te-la-a-la-pow. kung-yen 7 se-ci, cen-tung Ha-li-ba makay sawali Low-ma mademec tu kuyni a tukay, sumad hantu ku ngangan An-man han. . i hamin teban nu se-ci tu hamin nu demiad, uyni a tukay malu tungus nu Pa-al-ka-kaw-ti, pakaniya'ay tu cacanan kacakat atu kapakuyuc a mihcaan. katukuh tu 15 se-ci katukuh 1878 a mihcaan, mapaales tu ku An-man, itawya uyni a kitizaan uyza dada' Ciy-al ke-s ku mana'nelay. ayzaay tu a ziday, An-man a saayaway se-cen-bu-wi-yen-huy 1909 a mihcaan patizeng, yu An-man i 1921 a mihcaan mapatuzu' u likut a Ye-tan a angangnan nu tukay hawsa, uyni a tukay pakaniya'ay tu kalamkam macakat, misulup tu makaniay Ye-tan atu Li-ban-te masasumaay a tukay nu mabulaway, apakaniya'ay tu pina kalalid nu mabulaway, saayaway patizeng tu pitu adidi'ay byu' a tukay. imahini maawas t uku 19 adidi'ay abuyu', masanga' pasu 22 ku pikawawan a tuse nu An-man, imahinisawali a An-man angangan amisuped tu canacanan tu nazipaan nu likisi, hina palekal mikawaw tu lalangawan, satipay An-man nu ayzaaytu a mihcaan, nuyni a tukuy angangan nu kezay. ayza, An-man nu cung-tung a kitizaan cayay kakatuuday a I-s-lan-cyaw, kilisetu atu cayay kakatuud a singku caay kahapinang ku kacatuli a mapulung mueneng tuyni a lalaan' 2018 a mihcaan pakala tu 100 emang ku midangay a labang katukuh i An-man, uyni An-man malahamin nu kitakit tu saka 89 ku mipalitaay tu satabakiay a tukay atu saka12 ku mipalitaay nu satabakiay a tukay nu A-la-pow. An-man a kezay dadawa a macakat, duduc hamin nu kitakit atu kitakitay a tukay nu migingkiway tu wanglu "GaWC" nihapuan a "kitakitay a tukay" a nganganan, An-man tungusay Beta caay ku nu kanatalay tukay dada', duduc tukay a kezay, mikuliay, hekal atu syakay lalangawan a kahini, mapasakamu Cung-tung atu pey-bey u sakapahay a tukay. imahini An-man nu A-la-pow kitakit u sakanamuhan miawasay a kanatal a kusi patizeng tu kitizaay mikawaw, atu masilac tu Tu-ha, Tu-pay dada'. šł≠śĖáÁāļÁ∂≠ŚüļÁôĺÁßĎ : ŚģČśõľ
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == an-man "a-r~…ĺa-pow a kamu, ****masar~…ĺuma, Ē~ °amm*n,(*am*a*n)" nu si-ja a kanatar~…ĺ ja-tan aŇčaŇčan atu satabakiaj a tukaj, nujniaj kanatar~…ĺ a k…ôzaj, ¶…ôn- ¶…ô atu pur~…ĺuŇč nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan, *,***,***, ku tad…ômaw nu an-man, u satabakiaj a tukaj nu r~…ĺi-ban a kakitizaan, a-r~…ĺa-pow i kitakit u sakar~…ĺima nu tabakiaj a tukuj atu sawar~…ĺian a kakitizaan nu sakasiwa tabakiaj a kakitizaan. tukuj tiin i nuwamisan nujni a kanatar~…ĺ, satipan nu a- ¶i-r~…ĺun a bujubuju Ē~ °an. kitizaan a ŇčaŇčan nu an-man makajniaj ni ¶ar~…ĺapan a buju Ē~ ° nu ńß…ôni "*abar~…ĺ" anu ¶aaj dińß…ôb "wadi", saajawaj a katańßkar~…ĺan tan…ôŇč pasuzikuz katukuńß kuŇč-j…ôn* a s…ô- ¶i, tiza nipaŇčaŇčanan a an- ¶a-r~…ĺ…ô nazipaan nu bar~…ĺuńßaj ba Ē~ °tuaj a zidaj, itiza tańßkar~…ĺ ku kitakitaj nu kasumamadaj nitu Ē~ °tu Ē~ °an ¶i an- ¶a-r~…ĺ…ô tu masatad…ômawaj. i nu mukin a zidaj, ujni a tukaj paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu *abbatńß ammon, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ i r~…ĺikisian nakatuud ku masasumaaj mikuwan, pasu aŇčaŇčan a tukaj nu ja-m…ôn ńßuŇčti a kanatar~…ĺ. kuŇč-j…ôn * s…ô- ¶i,tow-r~…ĺ…ô-mi ńßuŇčti a zidajaj a aj- ¶i atu ba-r~…ĺaw tow-r~…ĺ…ô-mi ar~…ĺ-s…ô mur~…ĺijaw patiz…ôŇč tujni a tukuaj, pasumad tu ŇčaŇčan "b…ô-r~…ĺa-tj…ô-b…ô" ńßan, mar~…ĺakitizaan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu si-r~…ĺa. i pikuwanan nu r~…ĺow-ma, b…ô-r~…ĺa-tj…ô-b…ô na u t…ô-ka-pow-r~…ĺi-saj nu sabaw ¶a ¶aj a tukaj nu si-r~…ĺa-r~…ĺow-ma, sakuwan nu p…ô-t…ô-r~…ĺa-a-r~…ĺa-pow. kuŇč-j…ôn * s…ô- ¶i, ¶…ôn-tuŇč ńßa-r~…ĺi-ba makaj sawar~…ĺi r~…ĺow-ma mad…ôm…ô ¶ tu kujni a tukaj, sumad ńßantu ku ŇčaŇčan an-man ńßan. . i ńßamin t…ôban nu s…ô- ¶i tu ńßamin nu d…ômiad, ujni a tukaj mar~…ĺu tuŇčus nu pa-ar~…ĺ-ka-kaw-ti, pakanija Ē~ °aj tu ¶a ¶anan ka ¶akat atu kapakuju ¶ a mińß ¶aan. katukuńß tu ** s…ô- ¶i katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan, mapaar~…ĺ…ôs tu ku an-man, itawja ujni a kitizaan ujza dada Ē~ ° ¶ij-ar~…ĺ k…ô-s ku mana Ē~ °n…ôr~…ĺaj. ajzaaj tu a zidaj, an-man a saajawaj s…ô- ¶…ôn-bu-wi-j…ôn-ńßuj **** a mińß ¶aan patiz…ôŇč, ju an-man i **** a mińß ¶aan mapatuzu Ē~ ° u r~…ĺikut a j…ô-tan a aŇčaŇčnan nu tukaj ńßawsa, ujni a tukaj pakanija Ē~ °aj tu kar~…ĺamkam ma ¶akat, misur~…ĺup tu makaniaj j…ô-tan atu r~…ĺi-ban-t…ô masasumaaj a tukaj nu mabur~…ĺawaj, apakanija Ē~ °aj tu pina kar~…ĺar~…ĺid nu mabur~…ĺawaj, saajawaj patiz…ôŇč tu pitu adidi Ē~ °aj bju Ē~ ° a tukaj. imańßini maawas t uku ** adidi Ē~ °aj abuju Ē~ °, masaŇča Ē~ ° pasu ** ku pikawawan a tus…ô nu an-man, imańßinisawar~…ĺi a an-man aŇčaŇčan amisup…ôd tu ¶ana ¶anan tu nazipaan nu r~…ĺikisi, ńßina par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ mikawaw tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, satipaj an-man nu ajzaajtu a mińß ¶aan, nujni a tukuj aŇčaŇčan nu k…ôzaj. ajza, an-man nu ¶uŇč-tuŇč a kitizaan ¶ajaj kakatuudaj a i-s-r~…ĺan- ¶jaw, kir~…ĺis…ôtu atu ¶ajaj kakatuud a siŇčku ¶aaj kańßapinaŇč ku ka ¶atur~…ĺi a mapur~…ĺuŇč mu…ôn…ôŇč tujni a r~…ĺar~…ĺaan Ē~ ° **** a mińß ¶aan pakar~…ĺa tu *** …ômaŇč ku midaŇčaj a r~…ĺabaŇč katukuńß i an-man, ujni an-man mar~…ĺańßamin nu kitakit tu saka ** ku mipar~…ĺitaaj tu satabakiaj a tukaj atu saka** ku mipar~…ĺitaaj nu satabakiaj a tukaj nu a-r~…ĺa-pow. an-man a k…ôzaj dadawa a ma ¶akat, dudu ¶ ńßamin nu kitakit atu kitakitaj a tukaj nu migiŇčkiwaj tu waŇčr~…ĺu "gaw ¶" nińßapuan a "kitakitaj a tukaj" a ŇčaŇčanan, an-man tuŇčusaj b…ôta ¶aaj ku nu kanatar~…ĺaj tukaj dada Ē~ °, dudu ¶ tukaj a k…ôzaj, mikur~…ĺiaj, ńß…ôkar~…ĺ atu sjakaj r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a kańßini, mapasakamu ¶uŇč-tuŇč atu p…ô-b…ô u sakapańßaj a tukaj. imańßini an-man nu a-r~…ĺa-pow kitakit u sakanamuńßan miawasaj a kanatar~…ĺ a kusi patiz…ôŇč tu kitizaaj mikawaw, atu masir~…ĺa ¶ tu tu-ńßa, tu-paj dada Ē~ °. ******* : **
S.FORM: == kakiliman == An-man "A-la-pow a kamu, ōĻŔÖōßŔÜmasaluma, 'AmmńĀn,( ēamňźaňźn)" nu Si-ya a kanatal Ya-tan angangan atu satabakiay a tukay, nuyniay kanatal a kezay, cen-ce atu pulung nu lalangawan, katukuh 2021 a mihcaan, 4,061,150, ku tademaw nu An-man, u satabakiay a tukay nu Li-ban a kakitizaan, A-la-pow i kitakit u sakalima nu tabakiay a tukuy atu sawalian a kakitizaan nu sakasiwa tabakiay a kakitizaan. tukuy tiin i nuwamisan nuyni a kanatal, satipan nu A-ci-lun a buyubuyu'an. kitizaan a ngangan nu An-man makayniay nicalapan a buyu' nu heni "Jabal" anucaay diheb "Wadi", saayaway a katahkalan taneng pasuzikuz katukuh kung-yen8 a se-ci, tiza nipanganganan a An-ca-le nazipaan nu baluhay ba'tuay a ziday, itiza tahkal ku kitakitay nu kasumamaday nitu'tu'an ci An-ca-le tu masatademaway. i nu mukin a ziday, uyni a tukay pangangan han tu Rabbath Ammon, kilul i likisian nakatuud ku masasumaay mikuwan, pasu angangan a tukay nu Ya-men hungti a kanatal. kung-yen 3 se-ci,Tow-le-mi hungti a zidayay a Ay-ci atu ba-law Tow-le-mi al-se muliyaw patizeng tuyni a tukuay, pasumad tu ngangan "bey-la-tye-bey" han, malakitizaan nu lalangawan nu Si-la. i pikuwanan nu Low-ma, bey-la-tye-bey na u Te-ka-pow-li-say nu sabaw cacay a tukay nu Si-la-low-ma, sakuwan nu Pey-te-la-a-la-pow. kung-yen 7 se-ci, cen-tung Ha-li-ba makay sawali Low-ma mademec tu kuyni a tukay, sumad hantu ku ngangan An-man han. . i hamin teban nu se-ci tu hamin nu demiad, uyni a tukay malu tungus nu Pa-al-ka-kaw-ti, pakaniya'ay tu cacanan kacakat atu kapakuyuc a mihcaan. katukuh tu 15 se-ci katukuh 1878 a mihcaan, mapaales tu ku An-man, itawya uyni a kitizaan uyza dada' Ciy-al ke-s ku mana'nelay. ayzaay tu a ziday, An-man a saayaway se-cen-bu-wi-yen-huy 1909 a mihcaan patizeng, yu An-man i 1921 a mihcaan mapatuzu' u likut a Ye-tan a angangnan nu tukay hawsa, uyni a tukay pakaniya'ay tu kalamkam macakat, misulup tu makaniay Ye-tan atu Li-ban-te masasumaay a tukay nu mabulaway, apakaniya'ay tu pina kalalid nu mabulaway, saayaway patizeng tu pitu adidi'ay byu' a tukay. imahini maawas t uku 19 adidi'ay abuyu', masanga' pasu 22 ku pikawawan a tuse nu An-man, imahinisawali a An-man angangan amisuped tu canacanan tu nazipaan nu likisi, hina palekal mikawaw tu lalangawan, satipay An-man nu ayzaaytu a mihcaan, nuyni a tukuy angangan nu kezay. ayza, An-man nu cung-tung a kitizaan cayay kakatuuday a I-s-lan-cyaw, kilisetu atu cayay kakatuud a singku caay kahapinang ku kacatuli a mapulung mueneng tuyni a lalaan' 2018 a mihcaan pakala tu 100 emang ku midangay a labang katukuh i An-man, uyni An-man malahamin nu kitakit tu saka 89 ku mipalitaay tu satabakiay a tukay atu saka12 ku mipalitaay nu satabakiay a tukay nu A-la-pow. An-man a kezay dadawa a macakat, duduc hamin nu kitakit atu kitakitay a tukay nu migingkiway tu wanglu "GaWC" nihapuan a "kitakitay a tukay" a nganganan, An-man tungusay Beta caay ku nu kanatalay tukay dada', duduc tukay a kezay, mikuliay, hekal atu syakay lalangawan a kahini, mapasakamu Cung-tung atu pey-bey u sakapahay a tukay. imahini An-man nu A-la-pow kitakit u sakanamuhan miawasay a kanatal a kusi patizeng tu kitizaay mikawaw, atu masilac tu Tu-ha, Tu-pay dada'. šł≠śĖáÁāļÁ∂≠ŚüļÁôĺÁßĎ : ŚģČśõľ

pur~…ĺuŇč nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan, *,***,***, ku tad…ômaw nu an-man, u satabakiaj a tukaj nu r~…ĺi-ban a kakitizaan, a-r~…ĺa-pow i kitakit u sakar~…ĺima nu tabakiaj a tukuj atu sawar~…ĺian a kakitizaan nu sakasiwa tabakiaj a kakitizaan. tukuj tiin i nuwamisan nujni a kanatar~…ĺ, satipan nu a- ¶i-r~…ĺun a bujubuju Ē~ °an. kitizaan a ŇčaŇčan nu an-man makajniaj ni ¶ar~…ĺapan a °tuaj a zidaj, itiza tańßkar~…ĺ ku kitakitaj nu kasumamadaj nitu Ē~ °tu Ē~ °an ¶i an- ¶a-r~…ĺ…ô tu masatad…ômawaj. i nu mukin a zidaj, ujni a tukaj paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu *abbatńß ammon, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ i t…ô-ka-pow-r~…ĺi-saj nu sabaw ¶a ¶aj a tukaj nu si-r~…ĺa-r~…ĺow-ma, sakuwan nu p…ô-t…ô-r~…ĺa-a-r~…ĺa-pow. kuŇč-j…ôn * s…ô- ¶i, ¶…ôn-tuŇč ńßa-r~…ĺi-ba makaj sawar~…ĺi r~…ĺow-ma mad…ôm…ô ¶ tu kujni a tukaj, sumad ńßantu ku ŇčaŇčan an-man ńßan. . i ńßamin t…ôban nu s…ô- ¶i tu ńßamin nu d…ômiad, ujni a tukaj mar~…ĺu tuŇčus nu pa-ar~…ĺ-ka-kaw-ti, pakanija Ē~ °aj tu ¶a ¶anan ka ¶akat atu kapakuju ¶ a mińß ¶aan. katukuńß tu ** s…ô- ¶i katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan, mapaar~…ĺ…ôs tu ku an-man, itawja ujni a kitizaan ujza dada Ē~ ° ¶ij-ar~…ĺ k…ô-s ku mana Ē~ °n…ôr~…ĺaj. ajzaaj tu a zidaj, an-man a saajawaj s…ô- ¶…ôn-bu-wi-j…ôn-ńßuj **** a mińß ¶aan patiz…ôŇč, ju an-man i **** a mińß ¶aan mapatuzu Ē~ ° u r~…ĺikut a j…ô-tan a aŇčaŇčnan nu tukaj ńßawsa, ujni a tukaj pakanija Ē~ °aj tu kar~…ĺamkam a tukaj. imańßini maawas t uku ** adidi Ē~ °aj abuju Ē~ °, masaŇča Ē~ ° pasu ** ku pikawawan a tus…ô nu an-man, imańßinisawar~…ĺi a an-man aŇčaŇčan amisup…ôd tu ¶ana ¶anan tu nazipaan nu r~…ĺikisi, ńßina par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ mikawaw tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, satipaj an-man nu ajzaajtu a mińß ¶aan, nujni a tukuj aŇčaŇčan nu k…ôzaj. ajza, an-man nu ¶uŇč-tuŇč a kitizaan ¶ajaj kakatuudaj a i-s-r~…ĺan- ¶jaw, kir~…ĺis…ôtu atu ¶ajaj kakatuud a siŇčku ¶aaj kańßapinaŇč ku ka ¶atur~…ĺi a mapur~…ĺuŇč mu…ôn…ôŇč tujni a r~…ĺar~…ĺaan Ē~ ° **** a mińß ¶aan pakar~…ĺa tu *** …ômaŇč ku midaŇčaj a r~…ĺabaŇč katukuńß i an-man, ujni an-man mar~…ĺańßamin nu kitakit tu saka ** ku mipar~…ĺitaaj tu satabakiaj a tukaj atu saka** ku mipar~…ĺitaaj nu satabakiaj a tukaj nu a-r~…ĺa-pow. an-man a k…ôzaj dadawa a ma ¶akat, dudu ¶ ńßamin nu kitakit atu kitakitaj a tukaj nu migiŇčkiwaj tu waŇčr~…ĺu "gaw ¶" nińßapuan a "kitakitaj a tukaj" a ŇčaŇčanan, an-man tuŇčusaj b…ôta ¶aaj ku nu kanatar~…ĺaj tukaj dada Ē~ °, dudu ¶ tukaj a k…ôzaj, mikur~…ĺiaj, ńß…ôkar~…ĺ atu sjakaj r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a kańßini, mapasakamu ¶uŇč-tuŇč atu p…ô-b…ô u sakapańßaj a tukaj. imańßini an-man nu a-r~…ĺa-pow kitakit u sakanamuńßan miawasaj a kanatar~…ĺ a kusi patiz…ôŇč tu kitizaaj mikawaw, atu masir~…ĺa ¶ tu tu-ńßa, tu-paj dada Ē~ °. ******* : **
